name: riya_ai

scripts.test:retail: npx playwright test tests/e2e/retail-role-flows.spec.js tests/e2e/retail-flow-coverage.spec.js tests/e2e/retail-flow-healing.spec.js
scripts.test:retail:single-video: node src/tools/record-playwright-run.js --output-name retail-p0-suite -- npm run test:retail:p0:headed
scripts.test:retail:headed: npx playwright test tests/e2e/retail-role-flows.spec.js tests/e2e/retail-flow-coverage.spec.js tests/e2e/retail-flow-healing.spec.js --headed
scripts.test:retail:record: cross-env RETAIL_STEP_DELAY_MS=1500 npx playwright test tests/e2e/retail-role-flows.spec.js tests/e2e/retail-flow-coverage.spec.js tests/e2e/retail-flow-healing.spec.js --headed

author: Riya
description: Agentic Playwright Framework with AI-powered self-healing selectors and flow recovery
